title: Acquire exact Motorola One Hyper stock boot image

preflight.note: Stamped by `repopact new`; the work item was recorded before implementation began.

acceptance_criteria.text: A firmware source for XT2027-1 / def_retail / retus / RPFS31.Q1-21-20-1-7-3 is identified and recorded with provenance.
The source package is verified to contain a stock boot.img matching the installed build before any patching or flashing is attempted.
The verified stock boot image is copied to images/boot_stock_RPFS31.Q1-21-20-1-7-3.img and its SHA256 is recorded.
No rescue, repair, flash, erase, relock, wipe, or firmware-write action is run without explicit operator approval.
